# Non-App-Specific Media Source Identifiers

**API Collection**

Identifiers for media sources which do not correspond to apps. Used with [doc://com.apple.medialibrary/documentation/MediaLibrary/load-options-keys].

## Constants

- **MLMediaSourceMoviesFolderIdentifier**: The media source for the user’s Movies folder. This source provides data when [doc://com.apple.medialibrary/documentation/MediaLibrary/MLMediaLoadFoldersKey] is provided with the [doc://com.apple.medialibrary/documentation/MediaLibrary/MLMediaLoadMoviesFolder] value.
- **MLMediaSourceCustomFoldersIdentifier**: The media source for custom folders. Currently, the only custom folder is the folder containing audio loops from Apple. This source provides data when [doc://com.apple.medialibrary/documentation/MediaLibrary/MLMediaLoadFoldersKey] is provided with the [doc://com.apple.medialibrary/documentation/MediaLibrary/MLMediaLoadAppleLoops] value.
- **MLMediaSourceAppDefinedFoldersIdentifier**: The media source for app-defined folders. This identifies a media source created from a relative path inside the caller’s app bundle. This source provides data when [doc://com.apple.medialibrary/documentation/MediaLibrary/MLMediaLoadAppFoldersKey] is provided in the options.

## Constants

- **Load Options Keys**: Keys used to specify the `options` dictionary argument to [doc://com.apple.medialibrary/documentation/MediaLibrary/MLMediaLibrary/init(options:)].
- **Media Source Identifiers**: Identifiers for media sources which correspond to apps used to manage groups of media objects. Used with [doc://com.apple.medialibrary/documentation/MediaLibrary/load-options-keys].
- **Well-Known Folder Identifiers**: Identifiers for well-known media folders used to specify the value for [doc://com.apple.medialibrary/documentation/MediaLibrary/MLMediaLoadFoldersKey].
